scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (repositories, tags, namespace); Docker Hub's write/webhook/build-trigger endpoints are out of scope (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

destructive repository deletion; not modeled by legacy
